message:
feat(sync): add RU integration for skill discovery and auto-reindex

- Add --from-ru flag to ms index command
  - Indexes skills from ru-managed repositories
  - Uses RuClient::list_paths() to discover repo paths
  - Treats ru repos as community/base layer

- Add auto-reindex after successful sync
  - Triggers when config.ru.auto_index is true (default)
  - Only runs if cloned or pulled changes occurred
  - Skips dry-run syncs
  - Reports status in both human and robot modes

Closes: meta_skill-327

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
